response.body: InvalidArgumentx-amz-content-sha256 must be UNSIGNED-PAYLOAD, STREAMING-UNSIGNED-PAYLOAD-TRAILER, STREAMING-AWS4-HMAC-SHA256-PAYLOAD, STREAMING-AWS4-HMAC-SHA256-PAYLOAD-TRAILER, STREAMING-AWS4-ECDSA-P256-SHA256-PAYLOAD, STREAMING-AWS4-ECDSA-P256-SHA256-PAYLOAD-TRAILER or a valid sha256 value.x-amz-content-sha256wrong_sha256_hash_value_12345SKG6HP0HYN01H4K40GGVxr8ZVtPf4/U29YfvIX0QfcfWIHWan0AA37pyzUUOtyDW8CLSaEVtAYEsg6TSAbwrygytm6ExT6EYS7AqtxUsOOa8rAly
